title: helianthemum variabile var. racemosum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. racemosum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic activities. Rockrose is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and may also have potential applications in treating conditions like diarrhea and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared using herbal remedies like infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to take advantage of its healing properties.
